particulars.description: By way of assignment the goodwill of the business the benefit of all justices licences and any public entertainment licences fixed charge all proceeds of insurance maintained in respect of the undertaking property and assets of the company all goods and moveable fittings floating charge the whole of the companys undertaking and all its property and assets whatsoever and wheresoever present and future. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee
